message.content:
@startuml
participant "students" as Student1
participant "students" as Student2

participant "grades" as Grade1
participant "tests" as Test1

participant "grades" as Grade2
participant "tests" as Test2

Student1 ..> Grade1 : 查看成绩和评语
Student1 ..> Test1 : 查看成绩和评语
Grade1 ..> Test1 : 每个实验的信息、成绩和评语
Grade2 ..> Test2 : 每个实验的信息、成绩和评语

@enduml
